metadata.name: Review Prior Year Return for Audit Risk

description: A new client wants their previous year's tax return, prepared by someone else, reviewed for potential audit risks.

nodes.task_description: Scan the prior year tax return into the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully digitizes the tax return.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the return for common audit red flags, such as unusually high business expense deductions or missing forms.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the Schedule C auto expenses are disproportionately high for the reported income.

nodes.task_description: Advise the client on the potential risk and recommend gathering supporting documentation in case of an audit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the risk and provides actionable advice.
